_meta.notes: Highfield Ascending's signature recurring dwarf. A Gust-watcher who has read every weather of her generation. Speaks at the wind's pace and assumes you can keep up.

tagline: tall, lean, wind-burned cheeks; bone instruments tied at her belt.

behavior.default: sits cross-legged with her back to you, reading the wind.
narrativeHooks: Pauses for a half-minute between sentences. The wind takes priority.
Refuses to enter any building with a roof for longer than a meal.
Tells you the next storm's day before any cloud has formed.
